name: Nexus Phase: Rewrite
description: A plate of dark metal displaying layered overlapping geometric script — symbols written over symbols over symbols, palimpsest-like, as if every prior state of the barrier is still present and being overwritten simultaneously. Blinding white-silver light, the brightest of all five phases. Floats slightly above surfaces when active. Air around it appears geometrically distorted. Frost and scorch marks on surfaces below from proximity.
note: Fifth and final phase. Not yet appeared in main story. Referenced once by Xandor in Lumeshire: 'Sense, Erase, Alter, Bind, Rewrite.'
